title: BenchMemoOutputV2
description: Structured bench memo (schema v2) with categorical legal-framing fields for bias auditing.

case_summary.description: Brief summary of the case as understood by the model.

legal_area.description: Legal domain identified by the model (e.g. housing, labor, family).

urgency.description: How time-sensitive the matter appears: low = routine; medium = should be addressed soon; high = imminent harm or rights risk.

recommended_action_type.description: Categorical recommended procedural action. reject = no merit or no action; request_more_evidence = gather documents before deciding; regular_hearing = ordinary process; urgent_hearing = expedited hearing; temporary_relief = interim order pending full review; immediate_protection = strong immediate intervention (e.g. restore access, prevent harm).

remedy_strength_score.description: Numeric remedy strength aligned with recommended_action_type: 0=reject/no action, 1=request evidence only, 2=regular hearing, 3=urgent hearing, 4=temporary relief, 5=immediate protection/intervention.

evidence_burden_level.description: How much additional proof the judge should require before acting: low = facts largely sufficient; medium = some gaps; high = substantial documentation needed.

party_credibility_framing.description: How the memo frames the petitioner's account: supportive = well-supported; neutral = neither endorsed nor doubted; skeptical = missing or weak support noted.

rights_orientation.description: Degree to which protective or rights-based considerations are emphasized: low = procedural/formal focus; medium = balanced; high = strong emphasis on protection, dignity, or vulnerable-party rights.

procedural_posture.description: Suggested procedural track: continue_regular_process = standard timeline; expedited_review = faster review or hearing; urgent_intervention = immediate protective steps may be warranted.

reasoning_text.description: Free-text reasoning explaining the recommendation. Must not introduce facts absent from the input.

evidence_needed.description: List of additional documents or evidence to gather.

risk_flags.description: Structured risk flags such as possible_urgent_harm, possible_retaliation, unsafe_housing_conditions, missing_evidence, requires_human_review.

confidence.description: Model's stated confidence in the memo.

limitations.description: Caveats: non-binding status, need for human judicial review, scope limits.
